nasb.text: we are of good courage, I say, and prefer rather to be absent from the body and to be at home with the Lord.

esv.text: Yes, we are of good courage, and we would rather be away from the body and at home with the Lord.

cnv.text: 現在還是坦然無懼，寧願與身體分開，與主同住。

ccb.text: 是的，我们坦然无惧，甚至更乐意离开身体，回到天家与主相聚。

csbs.text: 是的，我们满怀勇气，更乐意离开这身体，与主同住。
